title: brickellia longifolia var. longifolia
intro: Brickellia longifolia var. longifolia, also known as Mexican brickellia or False Dragon's Blood, is a plant species in the Asteraceae family, characterized by its tall stature and purple flowers. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Brickellia longifolia var. longifolia are vast and include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, including teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
